violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Fan in kitchen/prep area in need of cleaning.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. - Bathroom door needs to be self closing

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. - Visible damage on the ceiling. Ceilings have build up, need cleaned and repaired
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
